scenes.text: Artificial intelligence is no longer a distant dream. It is reshaping the world we live in, right now.
scenes.prompt: futuristic city at night, glowing AI circuits, cinematic, 4k, dramatic lighting

scenes.text: From healthcare to education, AI is solving problems that once seemed impossible.
scenes.prompt: doctor using holographic AI interface in hospital, photorealistic, cinematic

scenes.text: But with great power comes great responsibility. How we guide this technology will define our future.
scenes.prompt: human hand reaching toward AI robot hand, dramatic lighting, cinematic, symbolic

scenes.text: The question is not whether AI will change everything. It already has. The question is: are you ready?
scenes.prompt: person looking at glowing horizon, silhouette, sunrise, epic cinematic wide shot
